siteMetadata.title: Randy Phalla
siteMetadata.description: I’m a Web Developer and Designer based London, Ontario Canada. I am passionate from about creating aesthetically websites and designs. I can help you translate your PSDs or design files and prototype them into web or mobile. I’m currently working at Devlift Media as a Web Developer, where I take designs and prototype them into the web or mobile apps.
